name: d35e-piecemeal-armor-called-shots
description: RAW-adapted PF1e-derived piecemeal armor and called-shot automation for the D35E Foundry system.

scripts.check:js: node --check scripts/constants.js && node --check scripts/profiles.js && node --check scripts/armor.js && node --check scripts/armor-profile.js && node --check scripts/helmet.js && node --check scripts/effects.js && node --check scripts/called-shots.js && node --check scripts/attack-dialog.js && node --check scripts/local-armor.js && node --check scripts/settings.js && node --check scripts/ui.js && node --check scripts/d35e-integration.js && node --check scripts/api.js && node --check scripts/module.js
scripts.check:tools: node --check tools/armor-piece-pack-documents.mjs && node --check tools/build-armor-piece-pack.mjs && node --check tools/build-called-shot-feat-pack.mjs && node --check tools/build-helmet-pack.mjs && node --check tools/build-release.mjs && node --check tools/check-localization.mjs && node --check tools/check-public-surface.mjs && node --check tools/publish-foundry-release.mjs && node --check tools/test-armor.mjs && node --check tools/test-armor-piece-pack.mjs && node --check tools/test-armor-profile.mjs && node --check tools/test-called-shots.mjs && node --check tools/test-effects.mjs && node --check tools/test-feat-pack.mjs && node --check tools/test-helmet.mjs && node --check tools/test-local-armor.mjs && node --check tools/test-ux-helpers.mjs && node --check tools/validate-module.mjs
scripts.build:packs: node tools/build-called-shot-feat-pack.mjs && node tools/build-helmet-pack.mjs && node tools/build-armor-piece-pack.mjs
scripts.validate: node tools/validate-module.mjs && npm run check:js && npm run check:tools && npm run check:localization && npm run check:public && npm run test:armor && npm run test:armor-piece-pack && npm run test:armor-profile && npm run test:called-shots && npm run test:effects && npm run test:feat-pack && npm run test:helmet && npm run test:local-armor && npm run test:ux
